summary: Expanded and refined project rules across multiple domains: CSS (vanilla only, no SCSS-style nesting), JavaScript (browser/jQuery focus, avoiding Node-specific globals), PHP (SOLID principles, type hints, immutable objects, dependency injection), WordPress (strict permission callbacks for REST, capability+nonce checks for AJAX, i18n with sprintf), Node.js (ES modules, async/await, error handling), security (output escaping, secret handling), and quality assurance (adding integration-first TDD testing rules to index)
